thread_title: 🎊喚醒體爆料：漆黑之羽┊Awaker Revelations:The Dark Feather

content:
5月20日是什麼特別的日子嗎？堆滿彌薩格取貨間並收到了大量寄給守密人的快遞 ，呀不好！幾隻鮮活的章魚腳從盒子縫隙處鑽出了！！！

💭寄件名單極其混亂，守密人能從盒子裡的禮物認出寄件人是誰嗎？
📢在遊戲內輸入兌換碼可以查看隨禮物附上的信件，其中的線索可能會有所幫助哦！
——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——
Is May 20th a special day? The Mythag pickup room was filled with parcels and a large number of express deliveries addressed to the Keeper were received. Oh no! Several fresh octopus legs emerged from the gaps in the box! ! !

💭The mailing list is extremely confusing. Can the keeper recognize the sender from the gift in the box?
📢Enter the redemption code in the game to view the letter attached to the gift. The clues in it may be helpful!

📦：📜🪄 🎼
✉️：GPAXWADZYWKF
--------------------------------
📦：🕷️🗿🗿
✉️：KGNYERWCQSGV
--------------------------------
📦：🐙🥘📃一張章魚花式製作菜譜┊A recipe for fancy octopus dishes?
✉️：WZDCXREYSEDQ
--------------------------------
📦：☁️👒💐
✉️：KYJRMSGGDBWS
--------------------------------
📦：📚️📚️📚️與書一起寄來的還有若干黑色羽毛筆┊Along with the book came a number of black feather pens.
✉️：CLHRNYNQLQWQ
--------------------------------
📦：👓📖🗡️小心近視啦┊Be careful of myopia
✉️：XRCHTLAVYJXZ
